title: Mid/Senior Business Developer (Product Development) in Savings and Investments Tribe | SEB, Riga

summary.lv: Mid/Senior biznesa attīstības speciālists SEB Uzkrājumu un investīciju komandā (FX un atvasinātie instrumenti), kas pārvērš biznesa un regulējuma vajadzības prasībās, vada darbnīcas un virza risinājumus no idejas līdz UAT un ieviešanai.
summary.en: Mid/Senior Business Developer in SEB's Savings and Investments tribe (FX and derivatives), translating business and regulatory needs into requirements, facilitating workshops, and driving solutions from idea through UAT and rollout.
